description: Generate index contours from the elevation raster located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/raster/srtm_41_19.tif. Use a base contour interval of 20 meters with an elevation attribute named 'ELEV'. Extract only the index contours (elevations that are multiples of 100 meters) and export the result as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/index_contours.geojson.
